cases.request: Choose ways to build a sun, moon, and land system.
This API renders incorrectly on our installed Three.js release. Determine whether a later release fixed it.
A matching pull request is merged to the development branch but no containing package release is proven.
A closed issue shares one keyword but uses another backend and does not reproduce locally.
The current documentation names an API that the resolved installed package does not export.
The minimal repro still fails on the current checked release and no equivalent upstream report exists.
Installed source proves the application violated the API contract and the corrected repro passes.
